movie.actors: Shia LaBeouf, Megan Fox, Josh Duhamel, Tyrese Gibson
movie.awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. Another 15 wins & 27 nominations.
movie.plot: Sam Witwicky leaves the Autobots behind for a normal life. But when his mind is filled with cryptic symbols, the Decepticons target him and he is dragged back into the Transformers' war.
movie.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen
movie.writer: Ehren Kruger, Roberto Orci, Alex Kurtzman
